Manus just dropped a feature called My Computer that lets their AI agent work directly on your local machine.   
  
Building apps, organizing files, running scripts. All through the command line.   
  
I prompted it from my phone and Manus did everything on \my computer\ back home.  
  
Use the link in my bio to get 1,000 free credits when you sign up.  
  
And for the next few days, tasks will consume 50% fewer credits (on Manus Desktop only). Offer expires on March 30th at 11:59pm PST. So if you’ve been thinking about trying Manus, now’s the time.

results.title: Troubleshooting the "My Computer" Feature Not Appearing or Connecting | Manus Help Center
results.content:
Manus Help Center

# Troubleshooting the "My Computer" Feature Not Appearing or Connecting

Discover troubleshooting resolutions with the "My Computer" feature

Table of contents

Resolve common issues about the "My Computer" feature.

The "My Computer" feature is a powerful capability of the Manus Desktop App that allows the Manus AI agent to execute command line instructions (CLI) in your computer's terminal, enabling it to read, analyze, and edit local files, and even launch applications.

However, you might occasionally encounter issues where the feature does not appear or fails to connect properly. This guide addresses the most common troubleshooting scenarios reported by our users.

## 1. Using the Correct Application Version [...] ## 1. Using the Correct Application Version

The most common reason users cannot find the "My Computer" feature is due to using an incorrect version of the application. The feature is exclusively available in the official Manus Desktop App.

If you are using the web-based platform (manus.im) through a browser, the "My Computer" feature will not be visible. You must download and install the dedicated desktop application.

Solution: Ensure you have downloaded the official installer from . Once installed, sign into your account, click "My computer", and add the local folders you'd like Manus to work with.

## 2. Platform Compatibility Limitations [...] ## 2. Platform Compatibility Limitations

The Manus Desktop App has specific system requirements. If your system does not meet these requirements, the app may fail to launch, crash on startup, or the "My Computer" feature may be disabled.

|  |  |  |
 --- 
| Operating System | Supported Versions | Known Unsupported Versions |
| macOS | Apple Silicon (M1, M2, M3, M4 series) | Intel-based Macs; macOS Tahoe may experience compatibility gaps |
| Windows | Windows 10, Windows 11 | Windows 7, Windows 8 |
| Linux | Not currently supported | All distributions |
